metadata.description: Secure coding guideline skills for vibe coders. Review code for vulnerabilities, auto-fix security issues, run pre-deployment checklists, and generate secure coding prompts.

plugins.name: kktv-en
plugins.description: Secure coding skills (English). review(security audit), fix(auto-fix vulnerabilities), check(pre-deployment checklist), prompt(generate secure coding prompts for AI tools).

plugins.name: kktv-ko
plugins.description: 시큐어코딩 스킬 (한국어). review(보안 검토), fix(취약점 자동 수정), check(배포 전 체크리스트), prompt(AI에게 안전한 코드 요청 프롬프트 생성).
